{
  ProductActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductActivatorRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Product>(Create);

    static global::Product Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
    {
        var instance = new global::Product()
        {
            Name = values.TryGetValue("Name", out var v0) ? (string)v0! : default!,
        };
        if (values.TryGetValue("Age", out var sv0)) instance.Age = (int)sv0!;
        return instance;
    }
},
  ProductRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductRowReaderRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register() =>
        GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Product>(ReadRow);

    static global::Product ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
    {
        var instance = new global::Product()
        {
            Name = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings)
        };
        instance.Age = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadInt(cells[1], sharedStrings, 1, onError);
        return instance;
    }
},
  ProductSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class ProductSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product> NameColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Product, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

    public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Product, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

    public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

    public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product> AgeColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Product, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Age, configuration);

    public static void AgeHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Product, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
        => builder.Formula(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Age);
}

}
